cot_prefix: Okay, so Alice and Bob are playing this game with tokens. The rules are that they take turns removing either 1 or 4 tokens from the stack, and Alice goes first. The person who takes the last token wins. I need to figure out how many numbers n (from 1 to 2024) are such that Bob can guarantee a win no matter how Alice plays. First, I think this is a classic combinatorial game
